topic: Why Wi-Fi slows down at night
hook: Your Wi-Fi gets slower at night.
body: More nearby devices wake up after dinner. They crowd the same wireless channels. Your router waits longer, so everything feels slower.
cta: Follow for more smart tech facts.
prompt_template:
Create a short-form faceless video script for an 18-28 second vertical short.
Inputs:
- channel niche
- audience
- topic
- language
- prompt style
- style notes

Output requirements:
1. Hook: exactly 1 simple sentence, under 10 words
2. Body: 2-3 short spoken sentences
3. CTA: exactly 1 short action sentence, under 6 words
4. Every sentence should express one idea only
5. Use plain, easy spoken language
6. Total spoken script should feel natural for YouTube Shorts
7. Avoid generic filler, jargon, and robotic phrasing
